notes:
Ember 1.3.0

• Bulk productivity (no setup, fully local): hand Ember a messy folder and it can triage it (folder_report), read across many PDFs/Word/Excel/text files at once to summarise or answer questions (bulk_read_documents), and tidy up by sorting into Documents/Images/… or date folders (organize_folder) or batch-renaming (bulk_rename). The tidy-up tools preview a plan first and only move/rename after you approve.
• Cohesive UI accent across the whole interface (1.2.9).

Includes the smarter network scan + automatic voice (1.2.8) and earlier fixes.
